text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, I ran confidently thanks to you, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! I saw! Your tenacious
running brought a tear to my eye!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh… Two opposites drawn together, their rivalry pushing them to grow even stronger, and maybe even closer…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's giving me all the feels!
OTP of the Year, right here!!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I don't know what you're saying,
but I sense you are showing reverence
toward your Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As a sign of my gratitude, I shall appoint
you an honorary citizen of the Kingdom
of T.M. Opera!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm an honorary citizen? Of your kingdom?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-I couldn't possibly! This is more
than I can handle!!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-Are you okay, Digital?! If you're not
feeling well, I'll take you to the infirmary!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: COUGH! And now you want to be my escort?! My oshis, you are too generous…
